vehicles.name: Sedan
vehicles.description: Perfect for small families and business travel. Our sedans offer a comfortable ride with AC, music system, and professional drivers.

vehicles.name: SUV
vehicles.description: Ideal for family trips and group travel. Our SUVs provide spacious interiors, powerful performance, and premium comfort for long journeys.

vehicles.name: Tempo Traveller
vehicles.description: Best for large groups, corporate events, weddings, and pilgrimage tours. Our tempo travellers offer push-back seats, AC, and entertainment systems.

vehicles.name: Luxury Car
vehicles.description: For premium travel experiences — weddings, corporate meetings, VIP transfers, and special occasions. Our luxury fleet offers world-class comfort.

vehicles.name: Wedding Cars
vehicles.description: Make your special day grand with our decorated wedding car rental service. We offer beautifully decorated cars for baraat, vidaai, and wedding functions.

services.name: Local Taxi
services.description: Hourly cab rental for city sightseeing, shopping, hospital visits, and local travel within the city.

services.name: Outstation Cab
services.description: Comfortable intercity travel for business, pilgrimage, family trips, and weekend getaways.

services.name: One-Way Taxi
services.description: Pay only for one-way journey. No return fare charges. Most affordable option for point-to-point travel.

services.name: Two-Way Cab
services.description: Round trip cab booking with designated waiting time at destination. Ideal for day trips and short stays.

services.name: Round Trip
services.description: Complete round trip package with driver accommodation included. Best for multi-day trips and tours.

services.name: Airport Transfer
services.description: Reliable airport pickup and drop service. Flight tracking, meet & greet, and 24/7 availability.

services.name: Wedding Car Rental
services.description: Make your wedding grand with our decorated fleet. Baraat, vidaai, and wedding function car rental with decoration.

services.name: Corporate Car Rental
services.description: Professional car rental for corporate travel, employee transport, client meetings, and business events. Monthly contracts available.
